title: Air Force Research Laboratory
text:
OPTIMIZING WARFIGHTER PERFORMANCE
Real-time physical and cognitive insights from these tools enhance warfighter readiness, inform personalized interventions (medicine, nutrition, training), and enable future human-machine teaming. Our approach is built on four pillars:
Gold standard testing to validate sensor efficacy and ensure accuracy
In-garrison applications to optimize training and readiness in a controlled environment
Operational applications to support tactical decision-making and enhance mission effectiveness
Next-generation sensors to stay ahead of emerging threats and leverage cutting-edge technology
Wearables enhance warfighter performance, safety, and effectiveness, ensuring they remain ahead of evolving threats.
